emacs-loop.description: Start the cooperative Org-task session loop against a session Org file open in Emacs.
emacs-loop.template:
Start the cooperative human/AI Org-task session loop for the session file: $ARGUMENTS

If no path was given, use the Org file currently open in Emacs (get_buffer_filename).

Follow the org-task-loop skill: read the session with org_task_session, work the first actionable TODO item, report status back into the file via the org_task_* tools, then block on org_task_wait_for_change and react to the human's next edit. The human is the driver — never reorder, delete, rewrite, or save their content.
